_purpose: Side-channel record of source-file regions Claude has freshly read. Used to detect stale mental models before making code claims.

_workflow.update_when: After a Read tool call on a source file where Claude is building or maintaining a mental model. One entry per (file, contiguous region).
_workflow.verify_before: Making any specific code claim (line numbers, identifier names, presence/absence of bugs, code structure).
verify_steps: 1. Get the file's current mtime via PowerShell: (Get-Item path).LastWriteTime

2. ConvertFrom-Json auto-parses mtime_at_read into a DateTime object — compare DateTimes directly via .Ticks or via .ToString('o') on BOTH sides. Do NOT compare DateTime to raw ISO string — PowerShell's display formatting will mislead you.

3. If mtime matches, compute SHA-256-first-12-hex-lowercase of the line at stored start_line and compare to first_line_hash. If mismatch, the region was edited (without changing overall file mtime? unlikely) OR the stored data is wrong — re-read.

4. NOTE: a single-line hash for generic lines (lone braces, blank lines) can false-negative on inserts that happen to place the same line at the stored offset. For such regions, treat the hash check as advisory and re-read on any doubt.
5. Both checks pass: the region is current. Proceed with the claim.
_workflow.hash_function: SHA-256 of the UTF-8 bytes of the line text (no trailing newline), then first 12 hex chars, lowercase.
_workflow.do_not_track: One-off file peeks, files Claude is not actively reasoning about. Tracking everything degrades signal-to-noise.

regions.purpose: Cast_Change_Terrain — lines 532-547 enumerate eligible terrain types (Grasslands/Forest/Desert/Volcano/Hills/Mountain/Swamp); Shore and Ocean explicitly excluded. Lines 552-556 exclude all Nodes.
Cast_Raise_Volcano — lines 825-864 reject Sailable (water/shore), Mountain, Hills, River. Cannot target shore/water.

regions.first_line_excerpt: int16_t Square_Is_Shoreline(int16_t wx, int16_t wy, int16_t wp)
regions.purpose: Square_Is_Shoreline — reads TERRAIN_TYPE only, checks against shore-terrain-type enum ranges. Result depends only on terrain type at the square (which Change Terrain and Raise Volcano cannot modify to/from shore).

CONTX_CreateLChains__WIP — producer of _ai_landmass_dock_squares_heads[] and _ai_landmass_dock_squares_lists[]. Reads first 90 lines (signature through partial chain-build loop). Builds load-square chains: for each non-ocean square within 1 square of shoreline, add to landmass's chain. Slot 0 always ST_UNDEFINED (loop filters out landmass_idx == 0). Called ONCE at game load, never refreshed.

Load-screen AI/MOVE initialization block — confirms CONTX_CreateLChains__WIP is called once at game load and never refreshed (only call site). Generic '/*' first line — re-locate via grep for 'BEGIN:  AI CONT / MOVE' if hash mismatches.
regions._note: Generic first line — use the 'BEGIN: AI CONT / MOVE' comment to relocate if shifted.
